text.title: On-Call Rotation Setup Output Contract
text.summary: JSON-schema output contract the subagent applying on-call-rotation-setup must produce. Required fields, forbidden patterns, allowed transformations, plus valid + invalid worked examples.

section.title: Output schema (JSON Schema draft-07)

forbidden.pattern: Shifts >24h continuous without explicit medical / safety review.
No secondary tier when service is mission-critical.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Order arrays deterministically by their natural key before serialising.

example.note: All required fields populated; forbidden patterns absent.
Missing the first required field — schema rejects.

list.item: All required fields present and non-null.
